channel.title: Prof. Dr. Prof. h.c. Andreas Dengel | Sustainable Embedded AI
channel.description: Prof. Dr. Prof. h.c. Andreas Dengel

image.title: Prof. Dr. Prof. h.c. Andreas Dengel

item.title: Prof. Dr. Prof. h.c. Andreas Dengel
item.description: Andreas Dengel is Executive Director of the German Research Center for Artificial Intelligence (DFKI) in Kaiserslautern, head of the research area Smart Data & Knowledge Services at DFKI and the DFKI Deep Learning Competence Center.

item.title: Which Transformer to Favor: A Comparative Analysis of Efficiency in Vision Transformers
item.description: Citation: T. C. Nauen, S. Palacio, F. Raue, A. Dengel, „Which Transformer to Favor: A Comparative Analysis of Efficiency in Vision Transformers“, IEEE/CVF Winter Conference on Applications of Computer Vision, WACV, 2025

item.title: Waving Goodbye to Low-Res: A Diffusion-Wavelet Approach for Image Super-Resolution
TaylorShift: Shifting the Complexity of Self-Attention from Squared to Linear (and Back) using Taylor-Softmax
DWA: Differential Wavelet Amplifier for Image Super-Resolution
